Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT

Title: Authorizes the county of Putnam to lease certain lands used as parklands
Summary: Authorizes the county of Putnam to alienate certain lands used as parklands in the town of Carmel for use as a cell tower for thirty years.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the county of Putnam to lease certain lands used as parklands
